org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonpatch.JsonPatchOperation

Packages that use JsonPatchOperation
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonpatch
Juneau @Marshalled types for JSON Patch (RFC 6902).

  • Uses of JsonPatchOperation in org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonpatch

    Subclasses of JsonPatchOperation in org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonpatch
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AddOp
    The JSON Patch "add" operation per RFC 6902 § 4.1.
    class 
    CopyOp
    The JSON Patch "copy" operation per RFC 6902 § 4.5.
    class 
    MoveOp
    The JSON Patch "move" operation per RFC 6902 § 4.4.
    class 
    RemoveOp
    The JSON Patch "remove" operation per RFC 6902 § 4.2.
    class 
    ReplaceOp
    The JSON Patch "replace" operation per RFC 6902 § 4.3.
    class 
    TestOp
    The JSON Patch "test" operation per RFC 6902 § 4.6.
